# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

---
Resources:
  SecurityGroupIngressHTTP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !GetAtt MySecurityGroup.GroupId
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 80
      ToPort: 80
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
  SecurityGroupIngressHTTPS:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !GetAtt MySecurityGroup.GroupId
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 443
      ToPort: 443
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
  SecurityGroupIngressSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !GetAtt MySecurityGroup.GroupId
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 22
      ToPort: 22
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
